segments.text: Sisters homes, year-to-date 2026. At ten months of supply, buyers hold the cards.
six eighty-seven thousand dollars this year, down 5 point 3 percent from last year.
seventy-five days to contract. twenty-six days faster than last year.
Sellers getting 96 point 5 percent of ask. There is room to negotiate, but not much.
156 homes active. A lot of supply, not enough buyers pulling the trigger.
